title: The Rockefeller Foundation and ICRISAT
abstract:
The Rockefeller Foundation has been associated
with ICRISAT since its genesis. Early consultations
about establishing a center such as ICRISAT were
held under the auspices of the Rockefeller
Foundation, and ICRISAT’s first 8,961 accessions
of crop germplasm in 1974 came from those
assembled by the Rockefeller Foundation in
collaboration with the Indian Council of
Agricultural Research, New Delhi.
